title: Nigerian Exchange Group Appoints Jude Chiemeka as CEO of Nigerian Exchange Limited - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigerian Exchange Group Plc (NGX Group) has announce the appointment of Mr. Jude Chiemeka as the Chief Executive Officer of Nigerian Exchange Limited , its operating exchange subsidiary, effective July 1, 2024, following the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) approval. Since January 1, 2024, Mr. Chiemeka has been serving as the acting CEO of NGX,
html: Nigerian Exchange Group Plc (NGX Group)  has announce the appointment of Mr. Jude Chiemeka as the Chief Executive Officer of Nigerian Exchange Limited , its operating exchange subsidiary, effective July 1, 2024, following the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) approval. Since January 1, 2024, Mr. Chiemeka has been serving as the acting CEO of NGX, succeeding Mr. Temi Popoola, who transitioned to the role of Group Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer of NGX Group.
